t_ch: …啊？！这、这怎么可能？
t_en: ...Huh!? But how is that possible?

t_ch: 不、不会吧，奥帝叔叔明明亲自和我确认过的！要不我联系一下他……
t_en: No... no way! Uncle Oti personally confirmed that with me. Why don't I give him a buzz...

t_ch: …见鬼！你明明只是打算初体验滥用职权的快感，却没想到第一脚就踹到了苜蓿草家主的侄子。这下要考验你随机应变的能力了，大佬……
t_en: ...Rats! You were finally experiencing the joys of abusing your authority, but you had to go and pick on the nephew of the Alfalfa family head. Now it's time to test your ability to think on your feet, boss...

t_ch: 我又快速查了一下——
t_en: I ran another quick check...

t_ch: ——原来是我搞错了。
t_en: ...And it seems I was wrong.

t_ch: 噢，十分抱歉——我刚才不小心输错了您的名字！我又查了一遍，您的预约记录果然还在。
t_en: Oh, I'm so terribly sorry — I must have misspelled your name accidentally! I just ran another check and sure enough, your booking is right here after all.

t_ch: …您运气真好！现在正值旅游淡季，白日梦酒店有很多空置的房间。
t_en: ...What fantastic luck! It's the off season and The Reverie Hotel has plenty of free rooms.

t_ch: 您原本预订的是一间经济客房，现在我们可以免费为您升级为「豪华客房」、「高级客房」或者「白金客房」！
t_en: You booked an economy room to begin with, but we are now able to upgrade you to a Deluxe Suite, an Executive Suite, or a Platinum Suite — free of charge!

t_ch: 真的吗？！太好了！奥帝叔叔果然靠谱！
t_en: Really!? That's amazing! Uncle Oti's the man!

t_ch: 请给我一间最舒适的客房！我已经等不及要去参加组…咳，我已经等不及去见识下传闻中的「黄金的时刻」了！
t_en: Please, can I take the most comfortable room? I can't wait to join up with the group... *ahem* I mean, I can't wait to see the legendary Golden Hour for myself!

t_ch: （随便说一个房间号）
t_en: (Say any random room number)

t_ch: 您的房间号是…<unbreak>13588</unbreak>，白金客房！
t_en: Your room number is... <unbreak>13588</unbreak>, the Platinum Suite!

t_ch: 请您乘电梯至酒店<unbreak>135</unbreak>层——那里会有服务人员负责接待。
t_en: Please take the elevator up to the <unbreak>135</unbreak>th floor... our staff will be waiting to meet you there.

t_ch: （把分配房间的责任推给别人）
t_en: (Shift responsibility for allocating rooms onto somebody else)

t_ch: 我已经通过系统为您分配了最好的客房！请您乘电梯至酒店<unbreak>135</unbreak>层——那里会有服务人员负责接待。
t_en: I've already assigned you to the best suite in the system! Please take the elevator up to the <unbreak>135</unbreak>th floor... Our staff will be waiting to meet you there.

t_ch: 感谢，感谢！不愧是白日梦酒店，你们的服务效率比想象中还高。
t_en: Thank you, thank you! They're right about The Reverie. Your service is even better than expected.

t_ch: 那么，回头见！
t_en: So, then — see you later!

t_ch: 咻…有些惊险，但还算顺利。没想到你的第一位客人就身份不凡。
t_en: Whew... that was a bit of a fright, but at least things got handled. Who would've thought that Guest 1 would be someone of exceptional status?

t_ch: 现在，唯一的风险就是白日梦酒店的<unbreak>135</unbreak>层并没有空置的客房。但没关系，你百分百信任同事解决问题的能力，哪怕你们素未谋面——
t_en: Now, the only risk is whether there actually is a spare guest room on the <unbreak>135</unbreak>th floor. But you're sure that's fine — you trust the problem-solving skills of your coworkers, even if you've never actually met them before...

t_ch: ——优秀的团队意识，老板！
t_en: ...Outstanding team spirit, boss!

t_ch: （不错的开头，{NICKNAME}……）
t_en: (Nice start, {NICKNAME}...)

t_ch: （希望接下来的工作也能如此顺利。）
t_en: (Hope the rest of this job goes just as well.)

t_ch: （那是…波提欧和银枝？）
t_en: (Is that... Boothill and Argenti?)

t_ch: （居然在一起行动…他们关系什么时候变得这么好了？）
t_en: (What are they doing out together... When did they become so close?)
Umm...

t_ch: 嗯？你在犹豫什么，我的朋友？
t_en: Hm? What are you hesitating for, my friend?

t_ch: …犹豫？你难道没发现吗？这个大堂经理长得和那个灰毛也太像了！
t_en: ...Hesitating? Haven't you noticed? This lobby manager looks just like that other guy with the gray hair!

t_ch: 我虽不擅长辨识脸孔，但此时也敢斗胆做出判断…你我眼前之人正是星穹列车的开拓者，我命定的挚友——绝无混淆的可能。
t_en: I'm not good with people's faces, but I dare you to be the judge... You and I are looking at the Trailblazer of the Astral Express, my destined friend... There's no confusion about it.

t_ch: 我再仔细瞅瞅…宝了个贝的，还真是你！匹诺康尼的大英雄，闲着没事跑到这儿来干嘛？
t_en: Let's take a closer look... holy forkeroni, it's actually you! The hero of Penacony... what are YOU doing here?

t_ch: 你个专业打枪的，眼神就这？
t_en: You're an expert gunslinger, but your eyesight is THIS bad?

t_ch: 你懂个宝贝！我的眼睛看得清清楚楚，只是脑子没转过来而已！
t_en: You don't know fudge! I can see things crystal clear — just my brain hasn't caught up yet!

t_ch: 我现在可是老板，牛仔！
t_en: I'm the boss now, cowboy!

t_ch: 哎唷，不得了！名利双收，你这趟匹诺康尼之旅收获还真他宝贝的丰厚啊！
t_en: Ah, no way! Fame and fortune — you've really gotten a lot out of this muddle-forkin' trip to Penacony!

t_ch: 为工作繁忙的员工揽下工作，让他们得以获得娱乐喘息的时间。如此大义，你果然是无私的「纯美」使者。
t_en: Taking on work for busy staff just so they can have some space to relax... you really are a selfless messenger of the Beauty.

t_ch: 没错，我就是如此高尚。
t_en: That's right. I really am so upstanding.

t_ch: 这个切入角度我还真没想到。
t_en: I didn't expect this angle of interpretation.

t_ch: 你情商真高，我的朋友。
t_en: You have a high EQ, my friend.

t_ch: 不废话了！现在这地方归你管，是吧？那就赶紧帮个忙，给我续个房间——
t_en: Enough bull-shooting! You're in charge here now, right? Then do me a favor, and give me a forking extension for my room fast...

t_ch: ——也请为我办理续房手续，我的挚友。
t_en: ...And please extend my room for the next few days too, dear friend.
*sigh*...

t_ch: 你们两个是怎么凑到一块的？
t_en: How did you two end up together?

t_ch: 宝了个贝的，你以为我想和别人一起行动？巡海游侠一向独来独往，谁承想这回居然让我摊上个赖着不走的跟班！
t_en: What the fork — you think I WANT to work with someone else? Us Galaxy Rangers always work solo. Never thought I'd have to put up with someone clinging to me like this!

t_ch: 悄悄告诉你，我这回来匹诺康尼还有别的任务在身——人命关天，相当重要！
t_en: Just between you and me — I've come to Penacony on a critical mission this time — a matter of life and death. Something extremely important!

t_ch: 怎么，还没玩够？
t_en: What? Still haven't had enough of this place?

t_ch: 玩什么玩！私下告诉你吧，我可是还有重要的任务在身——人命关天，相当重要！
t_en: Enough of what? Just between you and me, I've got a critical mission to carry out — a matter of life and death. Something extremely important!

t_ch: 我与波提欧兄弟在晖长石号上相识。起初，我只认为他言语粗鄙，是个配不上伊德莉拉祝福的横蛮之人……
t_en: I met dear Boothill aboard the Radiant Feldspar. At first, I took him for a potty-mouthed brute unworthy of Idrila's blessing...

t_ch: …但与他交谈过后我方才发觉，那副冰冷的机械外壳包裹着一颗滚烫的侠义之心。他配得上「纯美」的眷顾。
t_en: ...But after talking with him, I realized that this cold robot shell contained a blazing hot, chivalrous heart. He surely was worthy of the Beauty's favor.

t_ch: 宝了个贝的，你就不能——
t_en: Fork me, you can't just...

t_ch: 所以，我决定暂时与他同行，并为他尚未完成的高尚事业贡献一臂之力。
t_en: So, I decided to team up with him for now and put my efforts toward realizing his unaccomplished noble pursuit.

t_ch: ——你就不能少说两句？嗐呀……
t_en: ...Could you pipe down? For fork's sake...

t_ch: 「高尚的事业」指的是？
t_en: What does "noble pursuit" mean?

t_ch: 咳…告诉你吧，我在来匹诺康尼之前就听说了，有一个<color=#dbc291ff>极端危险的邪恶组织</color>已经在盛会之星扎根，准备以此处作为大本营，展开一系列危险行动。
t_en: *ahem*... Here's the thing — before I even came to Penacony, I'd heard about an <color=#dbc291ff>extremely dangerous evil organization</color> that's taken root on this Planet of Festivities. They're planning to use Penacony as a base for a series of deadly operations.

t_ch: 多亏了你们，家族的事儿已经解决得差不多了。趁着省下来些时间，我打算好好调查一下这个宝贝组织…哼，最好是能把它连根做掉！
t_en: Thanks to you, The Family's matters have mostly been settled already. I'm going to make use of my time left to investigate this muddle-fudgin' cult... Hmph, probably for the best if I completely destroy them shirtbags!

t_ch: 豪言壮语虽已放出，但波提欧兄弟其实还没能掌握这个「组织」的名字。
t_en: Brave words, but Boothill unfortunately failed to even get the name of this cult.

t_ch: …我真是爱死你这张漏风的嘴巴了！
t_en: Butter my fudge, so nice of you to air my dirty laundry!

t_ch: 反正，呃，情况就是这么个情况，续房的事就交给你了，大英雄！我现在得去调查这个「组织」留下的蛛丝马迹了……
t_en: Anyway, uh, that's how it is. I'll leave it up to you how many nights to extend the room, hero! Now I've got to get back to inspecting more clues left behind by this cult...

t_ch: 我也随你同去，波提欧兄弟。
t_en: I'm coming with you, Boothill.

t_ch: 波提欧和银枝匆匆离开了酒店大堂……
t_en: Boothill and Argenti hurry out of the hotel lobby...

t_ch: 你拨通了前台的服务电话，拜托「同事」处理了他们的续住需求。
t_en: You dial the number of the hotel reception, and ask your "coworker" to handle their room extension.

t_ch: （机械牛仔加纯美骑士，这对组合可真神奇。不知道他们能不能查出什么结果……）
t_en: (A cyborg cowboy plus a Knight of Beauty. What an amazing combo. I wonder what they'll be able to turn up...)

t_ch: （迄今为止干得不错，{NICKNAME}…继续努力！）
t_en: (So far, so good. {NICKNAME}... keep up the great job!)

t_ch: （又来了个皮皮西人？）
t_en: (Another Pepeshi!?)

t_ch: （今天是什么特别的日子吗……）
t_en: (Is today a special holiday...?)

t_ch: 您、您好……
t_en: H—Hello...

t_ch: 请、请问，这里是白日梦酒店前台吗？
t_en: Excuse m—me, is this The Reverie Hotel reception?

t_ch: 这是我的私人住宅，你越界了。
t_en: This is my private home. You are crossing the line.

t_ch: 原、原来是这样吗？！对、对不起，您家这么大，我一不小心就认错了！
t_en: I—Is that so? S—Sorry, your place is so grand, I got confused!

t_ch: 皮皮西人语气中透出的惊恐瞬间令你愧疚万分——的确，不论表面再怎么爱慕虚荣，你的内心依旧是柔软的……
t_en: The panic in the Pepeshi's voice instantly makes you feel guilty — sure, you might look vain, but you're still a softie deep down...

t_ch: 开玩笑的，这里就是酒店前台。
t_en: Just kidding. This is the hotel reception.

t_ch: 啊…原、原来如此，您、您还真是幽默……
t_en: Ah... I—I get it. You... you're funny...

t_ch: 对，你没走错。
t_en: Correct. You've come to the right place.

t_ch: 太、太好了，看来我没、没走错……
t_en: G—Great. Looks like I—I've come to the right place...

t_ch: 那个…我是、是来找之前入住的朋友的。请问您能帮忙吗？
t_en: So... I—I'm looking for a friend who once stayed here. Would you be able to help me out?

t_ch: 找朋友——又是一种全新的业务。该死，你才上任第一天，怎么麻烦事全都让你给碰上了？
t_en: Finding friends — another completely new kind of gig. Fudge it, this is your first day on the job. Why are you running into all this other trouble?

t_ch: 根据你有限的认知，为了客人的人身和财产安全着想，在大部分文明世界，想在正规酒店寻人都需要出示有效的证件信息表明身份。
t_en: Based on your limited understanding, among most civilizations — for the personal safety of the guest and their property — if you want to find someone at a hotel, it's customary to show a valid form of ID.

t_ch: 很可惜，你并不了解白日梦酒店平时是如何处理这种诉求的…但你还是想维持住自己专业的形象，所以你问了……
t_en: Unfortunately, you don't know how The Reverie normally handles this kind of appeal... However, you wish to maintain your professional image, so you ask...

t_ch: 你要找的人住在几号房？
t_en: The person you're looking for... what's the room number?

t_ch: 唔，请、请稍等，让我看看……
t_en: Uh, p—please hold up and let me see...

t_ch: 备忘录…备忘录…噢、噢噢，我找到了！<unbreak>135</unbreak>…是<unbreak>13527</unbreak>号房。
t_en: Memo memo memo... ah-ha — there it is! It's the <unbreak>135</unbreak>th... it's room number <unbreak>13527</unbreak>.

t_ch: <unbreak>135</unbreak>层？或许只是个巧合…你该问问他，他想找的人叫什么名字。
t_en: The <unbreak>135</unbreak>th floor? That's probably just a coincidence... You should ask him the name of the person he's looking for, just in case.

t_ch: 你要找的人叫什么？
t_en: The person you're looking for... what's their name?

t_ch: 我的朋友的名字是，罗…稍等，我再翻一下备忘录……
t_en: My friend's name is, R— er, hang on a sec. Where did I put that memo...

t_ch: 啊，找到了。他的名字是，罗伊罗伊…布奇布嘎…巴登豪威尔。
t_en: Ah, found it! *ahem* His name is Royroy... Bougiebooga... Baden-Powell.

t_ch: 原来是他！你感到一阵轻松，这样事情就好办了。
t_en: Him! You feel relieved — this is going to make things easier.

t_ch: 另外，你也对自己在酒店<unbreak>135</unbreak>层工作的同事展现出的专业能力感到钦佩：他或她顺利帮助罗伊罗伊先生完成了入住，而且完全没有扰乱你的工作节奏。
t_en: Also, you admire the professionalism of your coworker up there on the <unbreak>135</unbreak>th floor. They have helped Mr. Royroy complete his check-in without disrupting the flow of your work.

t_ch: 去找你的朋友吧！
t_en: Go find your friend!

t_ch: 十分感、感谢您！
t_en: Thank you... thank you very much!

t_ch: 那、那么，我就先上去了……
t_en: S—So I'll go up, then...

t_ch: 我得看下你的有效证件。
t_en: Let me see some ID, please.

t_ch: …咦？还要证、证件吗？
t_en: ...Huh? D—Do I need an ID to get in here?

t_ch: 呜…不、不好意思，{F#小姐}{M#先生}，我从来没来过这么奢侈的地方，不知道原来有这么多规矩……
t_en: Ooh... s—sorry, {F#madam}{M#sir}. I ain't never been to such a high-class place before in my life. I didn't know you had all these rules...

t_ch: 眼前的皮皮西人露出了一幅委屈的表情，晶莹的液态物质开始在他的眼眶周围打转……
t_en: The Pepeshi shoots a pitiful look, and a sparkling liquid gleam begins to swirl around inside his eyes...

t_ch: …这世上你第二难以忍受的事情，就是看着一个皮皮西人在你面前掉泪——心碎程度仅次于目睹妙龄银发美少女在你眼前化作泡沫。你决定放他一马……
t_en: ...The second-hardest thing in the universe for you to endure is to watch a Pepeshi weeping... second only to the heartbreak of watching a young silver-haired girl turn into bubbles before you. You decide to give him a freebie...

t_ch: 算了，你上去吧。
t_en: Forget it. Go on up.

t_ch: 十分感、感谢您！
t_en: Thank you... thank you very much!

t_ch: 那、那么，我就先上去了……
t_en: S—So I'll go up, then...

t_ch: （原来匹诺康尼也会有这种客人…本来以为能来得起这里的人都是非富即贵呢。）
t_en: (So Penacony has guests of that caliber, too... I thought everyone who could afford to come here was either filthy rich or an aristocrat.)

t_ch: （看他面相挺老实的，应该没什么大问题吧？）
t_en: (He looks pretty honest. There shouldn't be any problems, right?)

t_ch: （不想那么多了，不知道接下来还会遇到什么样的客人……）
t_en: (Don't think about it so much. Who knows what kind of guest I'll meet next...)

t_ch: （那是…砂金，还有托帕？！）
t_en: (Is that... Aventurine? And Topaz!?)

t_ch: （…糟了，可不能在公司的人面前露怯！{NICKNAME}，别紧张，好好表现……）
t_en: (...Shoot! You can't let the IPC see any fear in you! {NICKNAME}, relax and put on a good show...)
Mmm...?
Yo...

t_ch: …哼唧？
t_en: ...Oink?

t_ch: 欸，这不是{NICKNAME}嘛！刚才我俩还聊起你了呢，好巧！
t_en: Ah, it's you, {NICKNAME}! We were just talking about you a moment ago. What a coincidence!

t_ch: 有段时间没见了啊，朋友。我缺席的这段时间里，你是真没闲着。
t_en: Haven't seen you around for a while, friend. You've been busy in my absence.

t_ch: 先是小小地解放了一下匹诺康尼，然后又化解了晖长石号上的危机——虽说是虚惊一场吧——现在怎么又混到大堂经理的位子上去了？手头这么紧，需要同时打两份工？
t_en: First, saving Penacony. Then, resolving the crisis aboard the Radiant Feldspar — even though it was a false alarm — and how is it that you're carrying the title of lobby manager now? Are you so short of money that you have to work two jobs?

t_ch: 噢…是不是一路旅行颠簸太久，也想体验下坐班生活？早说嘛，战略投资部最近正在扩招，我直接给你安排个项目经理当当不就行了？
t_en: Oh... Are you tired from so much travel, and you want to experience what it's like keeping office hours? Why didn't you say so... The Strategic Investment Department is recruiting at the moment. How about I give you a project manager role?

t_ch: 以你的资历，P<unbreak>25</unbreak>…不对，起码P<unbreak>30</unbreak>起步，直接进驻庇尔波因特总部。住宿、三餐全包，所有差旅走公费报销，如何？
t_en: With your credentials, P<unbreak>25</unbreak>... No, P<unbreak>30</unbreak> at least, posted straight to Pier Point HQ. Meals, accommodation, and travel expenses are all reimbursed — how about it?

t_ch: （问托帕）起薪多少？
t_en: (Ask Topaz) What's the base salary?

t_ch: 没想到呀，看来你是真感兴趣？
t_en: I didn't expect that. Are you really interested?

t_ch: 薪资、奖金什么的都是小事，面谈就行——但你真的不去征求下姬子女士的意见吗？要是因为挖墙脚伤害到了我们重要的合作伙伴，那可就得不偿失了~
t_en: Your salary and bonuses are no big deal. We can talk about those... But really, Shouldn't you go ask Miss Himeko what she thinks? It will not be worth the trouble if poaching harms an important relationship of ours~

t_ch: （问砂金）你恢复得还挺快。
t_en: (Ask Aventurine) You're recovering pretty fast.

t_ch: 多谢关心，我现在还能站在这里跟你聊天，全都多亏了那位红发的纯美骑士出手相救。
t_en: Thanks for the concern. The fact that I'm standing here and talking to you is all thanks to that red-headed Knight of Beauty coming to my rescue.

t_ch: 我以前从来没遇见过真正的「骑士」，要是只听外面的传言，我甚至会觉得他们是一群热衷于哗众取宠的怪人。果然，凡事还是得眼见为实才行，是吧？
t_en: I'd never met a real knight before, and if I just listened to the rumors, I'd think they were just a bunch of sensationalist weirdos. Turns out, seeing is believing — right?

t_ch: 值得我好好考虑一下…
t_en: That's really worth giving some good thought to...

t_ch: …慢着，这可不公平啊，托帕总监。
t_en: ...Wait, that's not fair, Director Topaz.

t_ch: 哼…哼唧……
t_en: Oink... Oink...

t_ch: 我没记错的话，你手下P<unbreak>30</unbreak>以上的得力干将可不少吧？相比之下，我这里才正缺一位有能力、有胆识的项目经理。
t_en: If I'm not mistaken, you have quite a few capable workers above P<unbreak>30</unbreak>, right? Compared to you, I'm currently in need of an industrious and bold project manager over here.

t_ch: 跟着我干，直接P<unbreak>35</unbreak>起步——我手上掌握的资源全都随你调用。如何？
t_en: Come work for me, and you'll start at P<unbreak>35</unbreak> — with all my resources at your disposal. What do you say?

t_ch: 呵呵，原来如此…看来砂金总监是想当面和我抢人咯？
t_en: Haha, so that's how it is... So, Director Aventurine would like to poach people from right under my nose, huh?

t_ch: 为什么你手下的人少，原因应该不用我来点破吧？与其质疑别人的管理能力，不如花时间反思一下自己的工作习惯吧？
t_en: You don't need me to explain to you why you have so few people working for you. Instead of blaming others' management skills, you should spend a little time reflecting on your own work habits!

t_ch: 哼哼哼…「工作习惯」，很重要吗？别忘了，战略投资部的部门文化之一就是「结果至上」——
t_en: Hmmm... "Work habits." Are they really that important? Don't forget, the Strategic Investment Department's work culture is "Results come first"...

t_ch: ——连一颗小小的冰球都没能搞定，托帕总监重视的「工作习惯」怕不只是给项目失败找的借口吧？
t_en: ...You couldn't even handle a little frozen ice planet, Director Topaz. Those "work habits" you care so much about are probably just an excuse for failure, right?

t_ch: （徒劳地试图插嘴）
t_en: (Try in vain to get a word in)

t_ch: 你试图在两位公司高管针锋相对之时寻找时机插入自己的见解……
t_en: You try finding an opportunity to inject your own insight into this confrontation between two IPC senior executives...

t_ch: …毫无意外，你一败涂地。你只能无助地见证这场战争在你眼前展开……
t_en: ...And as expected, you completely fail. You watch on helplessly as this battle unfolds before your eyes...

t_ch: 想靠惯用伎俩挑衅，嗯？我没记错的话，哪怕把匹诺康尼这单全都记在你头上，你的成功率也还比我差了几个百分点吧？
t_en: Trying to stir me up with your usual tricks, huh? Let's see. Even if I count all the gains from Penacony under your name, your success rate would still be several percent points behind mine.

t_ch: 哎哟~只看数量不论质量，没想到咱们人美心善的托帕总监也学会偷换概念了。摸着良心说，我接手的项目都是什么难度，你可是比谁都心知肚明吧？
t_en: Awww, come on. That's looking at quantity over quality. I never expected the beautiful and kind-hearted Director Topaz to resort to distorting concepts like that. Look deep into your heart, will you? You ought to know better than anyone else how difficult the projects I take on are.

t_ch: 那我可得好好夸夸你。还记得那次你发给我的艾普瑟隆股市报告吗？「预计艾证指数将在经历沉底后强势反弹，建议投资者抓住时机，即刻加仓」——
t_en: Then I really should sing your praises. Remember that time you sent me an Epsilon stock exchange market analysis? "The Epsilon Stock Index is expected to bounce back strongly after bottoming out, and investors are advised to seize this opportunity and immediately take positions"...

t_ch: ——结果呢？第二天刚开盘，大艾直接跌破了<unbreak>2800</unbreak>万点…<size=28><unbreak>2800</unbreak>万，那可是史低，史低！</size>
t_en: ...But guess what? Just after markets opened the next day, the Epsilon Index went below <unbreak>28</unbreak> million points... <size=28><unbreak>28</unbreak> million — the lowest in its recorded history!</size>

t_ch: 这就开始翻旧账了？我不过一片好心，希望大家一起赚钱罢了…这种极小概率的意外怎么能怪到我头上呢？
t_en: Are we going to start digging up old scores now? I was just being kind and hoped that everyone can make a little money together... How can an accident as rare as that be blamed on me?

t_ch: 何况那件事我们不是早就复盘过了？给我消息的线人就是你在艾普瑟隆星际证交所的那位老朋友，谁能想到一个干了半辈子股票的人居然是个饭桶？
t_en: Besides, haven't we already done a retro on that? My source was your old friend at the Epsilon Star Exchange. Who knew that you could work in stocks your whole life, and still be incompetent like that?

t_ch: 哼，这时候就不提你那百战百胜的「运气」了？标准很灵活嘛，砂金总监~
t_en: Hmph, any reason why you're not bringing up your undefeated "luck" in this case? Your standards sure are flexible, Director Aventurine~

t_ch: 一想到战略投资部的高管也会被扑朔迷离的星际股市套牢…你感觉内心稍微平衡了一些。
t_en: The idea that top execs in the Strategic Investment Department can also get caught up in the chaos of the stock market... it leaves you feeling a little more balanced inside.

t_ch: 哼唧…哼唧……
t_en: Oink... Oink...

t_ch: 哎呀呀，大老远的就听到你们在吵架……
t_en: Oh my, I could hear you two fighting from miles away...

t_ch: …这两个孩子，感情还真好呢。
t_en: ...These two kids are such good friends.

t_ch: …咳，见笑了，翡翠女士。{NICKNAME}算是老熟人了，倒是不怕见外…砂金总监，下次再想吵架的话，也麻烦请你注意一下时间和场合。
t_en: ...*ahem* My humble apologies, Madam Jade. {NICKNAME} is an old friend of ours, so we acted a little too familiar before them... Director Aventurine, next time you want to pick a fight, please mind the time and the place.

t_ch: 哼，彼此彼此。
t_en: Hmph, right back at you.

t_ch: 差点忘了，我们是来退房的。{NICKNAME}，这是我的房卡——
t_en: I nearly forgot — we'd like to check out. {NICKNAME}. Here's my room card...

t_ch: ——等等，为什么是你先？没记错的话，我可是先一步到的。这年头，大家都忘记先来后到的礼数了吗？
t_en: ...Hang on, why are you going first? If I remember correctly, it was me who got here first. Has everyone forgotten the principle of "first come, first served"?

t_ch: （他还是那么在乎插队…）
t_en: (He still really cares about cutting in the queue...)

t_ch: （继续看戏。）
t_en: (Keep watching the drama.)

t_ch: 看来你是真的完全恢复好了啊？真遗憾~
t_en: Looks like you've really made a full recovery then? That's a pity~

t_ch: 和你争吵也属于复健的环节之一，托帕总监~
t_en: Arguing with you is a part of my rehab as well, Director Topaz~

t_ch: 呵呵…明面上是公司里数一数二的精英，私底下却还像是两个血气方刚的小年轻呢。
t_en: Hehe... They are top elites of the IPC in public, but just two hot-headed kids in private.

t_ch: 把房卡都给我吧，砂金、托帕。
t_en: Give me your room cards, Aventurine, Topaz.

t_ch: 翡翠将三人的房卡交给了你……
t_en: Jade gives you the three room cards...

t_ch: 在三位石心十人成员的指导下，你顺利帮助他们完成了退房手续。
t_en: Under the three Stonehearts' guidance, you successfully help them check out.

t_ch: 没想到退个房居然要折腾这么久…我得考虑收回之前的offer了。
t_en: Never thought checking out would take so long... I have to think about taking my previous offer off the table.

t_ch: 别拿{NICKNAME}开涮了，砂金。星穹列车现在和公司一样是匹诺康尼集团的持股人，我们可以算是地位平等的商业伙伴了。
t_en: Don't make fun of {NICKNAME}, Aventurine. The Astral Express is now a shareholder in the Penacony Conglomerate just like the IPC, so you can consider us equal partners.

t_ch: 啊…既然是商业伙伴，那不如留一张照片当做纪念吧？就把它当作集团代表之间的一次…非正式的会晤？
t_en: Ah... Since we're business partners then, why don't we snap a souvenir photo? Just think of it as... an informal gathering between group reps?

t_ch: 这个主意好。
t_en: Good idea.

t_ch: 同意。毕竟咱们想见上一面也没那么容易，对吧？
t_en: Agreed. After all, it's not easy for all of us to meet up like this.

t_ch: 我这身行头是不是有点寒酸…
t_en: Isn't my wardrobe a little shabby...?

t_ch: 这叫「突出个性」。你这么上镜，就别担心这种细节了。
t_en: That's called "leaning into your style." You're so photogenic, you don't have to worry about details like that.

t_ch: （等等，那是……）
t_en: (Hang on, that's...)

t_ch: （…青雀？！她来匹诺康尼干嘛？）
t_en: (...Qingque!? What's she doing in Penacony?)
Huh...?

t_ch: …咿、咿呀！{NICKNAME}、是{NICKNAME}吗？！
t_en: ...Yikes! {NICKNAME}? Is that {NICKNAME}!?

t_ch: 正是本人。
t_en: Yep, that's me.

t_ch: 这是你该来的地方吗？
t_en: You sure you should be here?

t_ch: 坏了坏了，我还想着这趟出门千万别碰上熟人呢…没想到还没入住就破功了！
t_en: Oh no, oh no! I really didn't want to bump into anyone I knew this time... let alone get rumbled before I could even check in!

t_ch: 那、那个啥，算我求求你了，{F#好姐妹}{M#好兄弟}！我来匹诺康尼这回事，你可千万别告诉别人呐！尤、尤其是太卜大人！
t_en: Please, friend, don't tell anyone about me coming to Penacony! E—Especially the master diviner!

t_ch: 想封我的口，价钱可不低啊…
t_en: If you expect me to hold my tongue, it's not going to be cheap...

t_ch: 嗨呀，就知道你要这么说！好歹给我留一点，够在匹诺康尼好好玩一圈就行！
t_en: Hey, I knew you'd say that! In any case, just give me a little time — enough for a little fun around Penacony!

t_ch: 你来匹诺康尼是为了city walk吗？
t_en: Did you come to Penacony to do a "city walk"?

t_ch: …我怎么听不懂你在说什么，这段时间你都经历了什么啊？
t_en: ...I don't understand what you mean. What have you been doing all this time?

t_ch: 为了能来这一趟，我可是把年假一次性都给请完了——太卜大人还以为我是去朱明仙舟串门，肯定想不到我其实是受邀来匹诺康尼旅游的…嘿嘿。
t_en: I took out all my annual leave at once just to come out here — the master diviner thinks I am visiting the Xianzhou Zhuming and doesn't have a clue I was invited out here to Penacony... tee-hee.

t_ch: 受邀？受谁的邀？
t_en: Invited? By whom?

t_ch: 我也不知道具体是谁，但是邀请我来的那条信息我还留着呢。
t_en: I don't actually know who, but I still have the invite message saved.

t_ch: 你来晚了，钟表匠已经无了！
t_en: You're too late — Watchmaker's gone!

t_ch: 钟表匠…是什么？
t_en: Watchmaker... what's that?

t_ch: 好吧，我也不知道是谁给我发的信息！但邀请我来的那条信息我还保存着呢。
t_en: Fine, I don't know who sent me this message! But I've still got the invite saved here in my messages.

t_ch: 你想看吗？那我就给你瞅一眼。
t_en: Wanna take a look? Let me show you.

t_ch: 青雀把手机递给了你……
t_en: Qingque hands you her phone...

t_ch: 怎么样，很棒吧？只要符合条件，房费可是全免哦。
t_en: What do you think? Awesome, huh? It's a free stay at the hotel if you qualify.

t_ch: 我来之前仔细量了下自己的净身高——早上<unbreak>141.2</unbreak>，傍晚<unbreak>140.3</unbreak>，简直完美！
t_en: I carefully measured my height before I came: <unbreak>141.2</unbreak>cm in the morning, and <unbreak>140.3</unbreak>cm in the evening. Just perfect!

t_ch: 这是对高个子的歧视！
t_en: This is discrimination against tall people!

t_ch: 呃…高个子已经享有很多便利了，你就别纠结这个了吧？
t_en: Uh... Tall people already have lots of benefits. Why don't you just let this one go?

t_ch: 不管从哪个角度看都很可疑…
t_en: It's dodgy, no matter how you look at it...

t_ch: 哪里可疑了？放心吧，我又不傻！一般的诈骗消息忽悠不了我的。
t_en: What's dodgy? Don't worry, I'm not an idiot! Normal scammers can't get one over me.

t_ch: 反正，呃…反正我就当咱们约定好咯？不许把我在匹诺康尼的事告诉太卜大人！只要你能信守约定，我赢的信用点就分你三分之一！
t_en: Anyway, uh... anyway, I'll just take that as a deal, then? Don't tell the master diviner about me being in Penacony! And as long as you keep your end of the deal, you can take one-third of the credits I win!

t_ch: 不够，得加钱。
t_en: That's not enough. I want more.

t_ch: 哎哟喂，真贪心啊{F#好姐妹}{M#好兄弟}…行吧，加就加，分你一半！
t_en: Hey... don't be too greedy, pal... Fine, I'll up the price. You can have half!

t_ch: 万一你输了呢？
t_en: And what if you just so happen to lose?

t_ch: 不存在的！我的牌技，你还信不过吗？
t_en: No way! Still doubt my skill at games?

t_ch: 好了好了，不多说了！假期的时间可是很宝贵的，赶紧帮我办入住吧。
t_en: Fine then, say no more! Vacation time is precious, so hurry up and help me check-in.

t_ch: 折腾了一番之后，你为青雀办好了入住手续……
t_en: After a struggle, you finally manage to finish checking Qingque in...

t_ch: 这入住手续还真繁琐啊…多谢你啦，{NICKNAME}！
t_en: This check-in process is highly arduous... Thank you very much, {NICKNAME}!

t_ch: 虽然不知道为什么你会在酒店当大堂经理，但现在我也不想多问了…假期的时间这么宝贵，可不能浪费在瞎聊这种事上。
t_en: I have no idea why you'd be working here as lobby manager in this hotel, and I'm not about to ask... Vacation time is too precious to waste on things like gossiping...

t_ch: 回头见，{F#好姐妹}{M#好兄弟}！记得履行承诺！
t_en: See you later, buddy! Remember to keep your promise!

t_ch: （以身高作为邀请的条件…怎么看里面都有些蹊跷啊。）
t_en: (Making one's height the prerequisite? Something's bizarre about this...)

t_ch: （或许只是某种恶作剧吧？希望到时候青雀能付得起账单……）
t_en: (Maybe it's just some kind of elaborate prank? I hope Qingque's able to foot the bill when the time comes...)

t_ch: （好困…今天还会有别的客人来吗？）
t_en: (I'm sleepy... Wonder if there'll be any other guests today?)

t_ch: 您好啊，{F#美丽的女士}{M#英俊的先生}，今天想要喝点什么呢？
t_en: Greetings, {F#beautiful lady}{M#handsome sir}. What would you like today?

t_ch: 给我来*一打*苏乐达。
t_en: I'll take one dozen SoulGlad.

t_ch: 呃…抱歉，{F#女士}{M#先生}。您应该也能看出来，我们这里是酒店的饮吧，不是超市……
t_en: Er... sorry about that, {F#madam}{M#sir}. You should be able to work out that we're a hotel bar, not a supermarket...

t_ch: 有需要的话，您可以至酒店前台大堂经理处，向礼宾部订购整箱……
t_en: If you want, you can go to the lobby manager at the hotel reception to order a full box from the concierge...

t_ch: 我现在就是大堂经理！
t_en: I AM the lobby manager!

t_ch: 呃，我大概没太搞清楚状况，{F#女士}{M#先生}……
t_en: Er, I guess I don't really understand what's going on then, {F#madam}{M#sir}...

t_ch: 你背后明明全是苏乐达。
t_en: You're standing in front of nothing but SoulGlad.

t_ch: 呃，那是因为…这很难解释，{F#女士}{M#先生}……
t_en: Er, well that's because... This is really hard to explain, {F#madam}{M#sir}...

t_ch: …抱歉{F#女士}{M#先生}，似乎有同事找我…请您稍等片刻。
t_en: ...I'm sorry, {F#madam}{M#sir}. I think my coworkers are looking for me... Can you please hold on a sec.

t_ch: 嗯噢哦……
t_en: Uh-oh...

t_ch: …我明白了，我明白了。
t_en: ...I see. I get it.

t_ch: 呃，非常抱歉，刚才似乎发生了些小误会，您别介意。同事已经把情况告诉我了，{NICKNAME}经理。
t_en: Er, I'm very sorry, but there seems to have been a bit of a misunderstanding. Please don't take it personally. My coworker has filled me in on the situation, Manager {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 这里的苏乐达请您都拿去吧，想拿多少就拿多少。只要能协助您做好工作，我时刻愿意效劳……
t_en: Please take all the SoulGlad here, as much as you want. We're always willing to help you, so long as it helps you perform your job well...

t_ch: 你用尽浑身解数，靠着双手和双脚拿走了整整*一打*苏乐达。
t_en: You do everything you can to get a whole dozen SoulGlads in your hands (and feet).

t_ch: 可惜你没有认真和仙舟罗浮上的某位桂姓女子认真学习杂耍技巧，否则你一定还能再多带走几瓶汽水。
t_en: It's just a pity that you never learned seriously how to juggle back on the Xianzhou Luofu with Miss Gui. Otherwise, you'd be able to carry off a few more bottles of soda.

t_ch: （很好！苏乐达续杯畅饮，这是大堂经理才能享受的特权！）
t_en: (Great! Free refills of SoulGlad, a special privilege only the lobby manager gets to enjoy!)

t_ch: （应该都准备妥当了…赶紧开始工作吧！我倒要看看这酒店里住的都是些什么人。）
t_en: (Everything should be pretty much ready... Let's get to work, then! I wanna see what kind of guests stay in this hotel.)

t_ch: （那群人是…等等，那不是知更鸟小姐吗？）
t_en: (The crowd over there is... Hold on. Isn't that Miss Robin?)

t_ch: （她是不是遇上麻烦了？这种时候就该大堂经理出手维持秩序了……）
t_en: (Is she in trouble? The lobby manager should step in and maintain order...)

t_ch: …停！你是干嘛的？我警告你，不许再往前了！
t_en: ...Stop! Who are you? I'm warning you to go no further!

t_ch: 我和她是熟人。
t_en: I'm an acquaintance of hers.

t_ch: 这世道，狗仔队的话术都这么蹩脚了吗？我再说一次，退后！
t_en: Do the paparazzi nowadays all resort to such lame excuses? Let me say it again — back off!

t_ch: 放肆！你知道我是谁吗？
t_en: How dare you! Do you know who I am?

t_ch: 我管你是谁！有我在，天王老子也别想接近知更鸟小姐一步！
t_en: Who cares? As long as I'm here, no one can get close to Miss Robin!

t_ch: 我是酒店的大堂经理。
t_en: I'm the lobby manager.

t_ch: 满嘴胡话！哪个大堂经理会穿成你这样？退后！
t_en: That's ridiculous! The lobby manager wouldn't dress like this. Back off!

t_ch: …啊，弗雷迪，没关系！这位{F#女士}{M#先生}是我的朋友。
t_en: ...Ah, Freddy, it's okay! This {F#lady}{M#gentleman} is my friend.

t_ch: 啊…这，原来如此。十分抱歉，{F#女士}{M#先生}……
t_en: Oh... I see. My apologies, {F#madam}{M#mister}...

t_ch: 请别介意，{NICKNAME}。弗雷迪初来乍到，遇到这种情况神经难免有些紧绷，我也不想让他感到为难。
t_en: I hope you're not offended, {NICKNAME}. Freddy is new here, so he tends to be a bit tense in this kind of situation. I don't want to make things difficult for him.

t_ch: 之前在晖长石号上，我本来打算花些时间和星穹列车的各位好好聊聊，没想到却被那出炸弹闹剧给搅乱了。
t_en: Back on the Radiant Feldspar, I thought of spending some time chatting with everyone from the Express, but the bomb scare threw everything off the course.

t_ch: 幸好最后没有人受伤…抱歉，我当时的状态不好，招待不周，希望各位不要介意。
t_en: Thankfully, no one was hurt in the end... Sorry for my bad hospitality at that time because I was feeling under the weather. I hope you all don't mind.

t_ch: 你现在感觉还好吗？
t_en: How are you doing now?

t_ch: 我已经调整好了，谢谢你真诚的关心。
t_en: I'm feeling well now. Thanks for your concern.

t_ch: 我没有兄弟姐妹…
t_en: I don't have any siblings...

t_ch: …但我能理解你的感受。
t_en: ...But I get you.

t_ch: 我相信你，{NICKNAME}。你有很强的同理心，哪怕不依赖同谐的力量也能与他人感同身受。
t_en: I believe in you, {NICKNAME}. You have a strong sense of empathy that enables you to relate to others even without relying on the power of Harmony.

t_ch: 我能理解。
t_en: I get you.

t_ch: 我相信你，{NICKNAME}。你有很强的同理心，哪怕不依赖同谐的力量也能与他人感同身受。
t_en: I believe in you, {NICKNAME}. You have a strong sense of empathy that enables you to relate to others even without relying on the power of Harmony.

t_ch: 匹诺康尼…每次回到这里，我的心情都非常复杂。梦境的十二时分就像一座永不落幕的舞台，台上的表演永远不能停歇，就像人的心脏不能停止跳动。
t_en: Penacony... I have mixed feelings every time I'm back here. The Twelve Hours here are like a show that never ends. The performances onstage never cease, just like our hearts can't stop beating.

t_ch: 不论失去了谁，盛会和派对都会继续。我们为这个世界付出的努力、泪水和代价，最后都会被人们对狂欢的贪恋淹没。
t_en: The festival and party go on no matter who is gone. The blood, sweat, and tears we have shed for this world will inevitably be overshadowed by people's obsession with revelry.

t_ch: 但愿我们一起埋下的种子能挺过浪潮的冲刷，{NICKNAME}。希望在宴会散去以后，大家都能带着微笑醒来……
t_en: I hope the seeds we planted together can withstand the erosion of the tide, {NICKNAME}. My wish is that everyone will wake up with smiles after the banquet ends...

t_ch: …不好意思，是我害得气氛有些沉重了。请别会错意，能在离开之前和你见上一面，说上几句话，我真的非常开心。
t_en: ...Sorry for being such a wet blanket here. Please don't get the wrong message — I'm truly happy to have this conversation with you before my departure.

t_ch: 离开？
t_en: Departure?

t_ch: 你要去哪里？
t_en: Where are you going?

t_ch: 我想要出去旅行。推掉所有的巡演、商务和代言工作，来一段只属于我自己的旅程。
t_en: I want to go on a trip. I've canceled all my concerts, business engagements, and endorsement jobs to have a journey just for myself.

t_ch: 从不知哪一刻开始，我变得有些厌烦头顶上过于明亮的聚光灯了。这一次，如果可以，我想选择自己的听众，我想为生长在路边的花草献上歌声。
t_en: Since some point in time, I've grown tired of the overly bright spotlight over my head. This time, if possible, I want to choose my audience. I'd like to sing for the flowers and grass on the roadside.

t_ch: 啊…这么说来，你有没有什么可以推荐的旅行目的地？无名客行于星间，一定去过很多令人惊奇的地方吧？
t_en: Ah... Speaking of which, can you recommend any travel destinations? As a Nameless, you must have visited many amazing places.

t_ch: 黑塔的空间站值得一去。
t_en: Herta's space station is worth a visit.

t_ch: 黑塔…是那位很有名的天才，黑塔女士吗？
t_en: Herta... Do you mean Madam Herta, the famous genius?

t_ch: 我还从来没有拜访过天才俱乐部的成员…这的确是个有趣的选项，谢谢你的推荐。
t_en: I've never visited a Genius Society member... This is an interesting option. Thanks for your recommendation.

t_ch: 有一颗名叫雅利洛-Ⅵ的星球。
t_en: A planet called Jarilo-VI.

t_ch: 雅利洛-Ⅵ……
t_en: Jarilo-VI...

t_ch: 从来没听过这个星球的名字呢…但既然是由你亲自推荐的，那我一定要找时间去参观一趟。
t_en: I've never heard of the planet... Since it's your recommendation, I'll surely find time to make a trip there.

t_ch: 不如去仙舟联盟看看。
t_en: You can visit the Xianzhou Alliance.

t_ch: 仙舟…我遇到过不少来自仙舟商会的歌迷，但的确一直没有机会去上一趟，去领略当地的风土人情。
t_en: Xianzhou... I've met many fans from the Xianzhou merchant guilds, but I've never had the chance to visit there myself and experience the local customs and culture.

t_ch: 谢谢你提醒了我，{NICKNAME}。
t_en: Thanks for reminding me, {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 我也只去过这些地方。
t_en: These are the only places I've been to.

t_ch: 已经帮到我很多了。再次感谢你，{NICKNAME}。
t_en: Your input is very helpful. Thanks again, {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 这星海是多么宽广无边啊！下定决心踏上旅程的那一刻，我感觉到身体里有一股强烈的创作欲望被唤醒了。
t_en: The stars are so vast and boundless! The moment I made up my mind to embark on this journey, I felt a strong inspiration awakening inside me.

t_ch: 我想试着开始写自己的歌了，{NICKNAME}。我想把自己生命中所有重要的事物都写进去，然后……
t_en: I'd like to try composing my own songs, {NICKNAME}. I want to write about all the significant experiences I've had in my life, then...

t_ch: …然后，等我旅行归来的那天，我想把它唱给流梦礁的孩子们听。
t_en: ...Then, I'll sing the songs to the children in Dreamflux Reef on the day I return.

t_ch: 知更鸟小姐…时间差不多了。
t_en: Miss Robin... It's almost time.

t_ch: 我知道了，弗雷迪，谢谢提醒。
t_en: Got it. Thanks for reminding me, Freddy.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，我们一起拍张照片吧？就当是为这段旅程留个纪念。
t_en: {NICKNAME}, how about we take a picture together as a memento of this journey?

t_ch: 交给我这个专业摄影师吧。
t_en: Leave it to me. I'm a pro.

t_ch: 我想应该不用麻烦你了——你看，这边有好多人都举着相机呢。
t_en: I think you're spared the trouble. Look how many people have their cameras on us.

t_ch: 真让人惊讶，你的表情管理意外地很不错呢~
t_en: I'm surprised by how you make sure your facial expressions look great all the time.

t_ch: 时间差不多啦，{NICKNAME}。这次告别虽然有些匆忙，但我们一定还会再见的，对吧？
t_en: It's almost time for me to go, {NICKNAME}. It feels a bit hurried to say goodbye now, but I'm sure we'll meet again, right?

t_ch: 知更鸟挥手同你道别，同时露出了一个如海报上的写真照一般——不，是比照片上更加灵动、鲜活的完美微笑。
t_en: Robin waves at you, revealing a smile that seems straight out of a poster — no, it is a perfect smile that looks more vibrant and livelier.

t_ch: （不知道青雀那边到底出了什么情况，好像很紧急…但是大堂的工作怎么办？）
t_en: (I wonder how things are going on Qingque's side. It sounds pretty urgent... But what should I do with the work in the lobby?)

t_ch: （算了，救人要紧…赶快去梦境里找人吧。）
t_en: (Never mind. Saving lives comes first... I should find Qingque in the Dreamscape right away.)

t_ch: 现在，跟着我重复——
t_en: Now, repeat after me...

t_ch: ——我感谢天命！
t_en: I'm grateful for my fate!

t_ch: 我，我……
愣着干嘛？还不跟着{RUBY_B#音同「霸」：短，矮}{RUBY_E#}矲主大人念！
t_en: What are you waiting for? Repeat after the {RUBY_B#short and stout}{RUBY_E#} master!

t_ch: 说出来，说出来！
t_en: Say it! Say it!

t_ch: 我、我感谢天命……
t_en: I... I'm grateful for my fate...

t_ch: 我感谢基因！
t_en: I'm grateful for my genes!

t_ch: 我感谢…呃，基因？
t_en: I'm grateful for... um, my genes?

t_ch: 我是宇宙凝缩而成的精华！
t_en: I'm the essence of the universe!

t_ch: 我是宇宙凝缩而成的精华——
t_en: I'm the essence of the universe...

t_ch: ——不、不行了，这句为什么莫名地好笑……
t_en: ...I—I can't hold it anymore! How come this line is so funny...

t_ch: 注意虔恭！你不够虔恭！
t_en: Mind your manners! You aren't pious enough!

t_ch: 我愿终止生长！
t_en: I'm willing to cease my growth!

t_ch: 我愿…终止生长……
t_en: I'm willing... to cease my growth...

t_ch: …这也太恶毒了吧！我才不到两百岁，还能长个呢！
t_en: ...That's way too vicious! I'm less than <unbreak>200</unbreak> years old! I can still grow taller!

t_ch: 不许废话，跟着矲主念！
t_en: Enough nonsense! Just repeat after the master!

t_ch: （那个什么「矲主」…不就是之前来办入住的老奥帝的侄子么？）
t_en: (That "master"... Isn't he the nephew of the Old Oti who came to check in earlier?)

t_ch: （青雀在好像在被逼着说一些怪话…这帮皮皮西到底在干嘛？）
t_en: (Seems like Qingque's being forced to recite some odd chants... What's this bunch of Pepeshi guys up to?)

t_ch: （管不了那么多了，上去问问看吧。）
t_en: (Whatever. Let me approach them and ask them directly.)

t_ch: 停、停下！阴暗的巨人族，前方禁止通行！
t_en: S—Stop! Evil giants have no access here!

t_ch: 等会儿，你是之前的…
t_en: Wait a minute. Are you...

t_ch: 您，您是…之前那位大堂经理？
t_en: A—Are you... that lobby manager?

t_ch: …巨人族？
t_en: ...Giants?

t_ch: 您、您听到我说的话了！不想受伤的话，就请在这里止步！
t_en: Y—You heard me! Stop here if you don't want to get hurt!

t_ch: 等、等等，您是…之前那位大堂经理？
t_en: Wait... Wait a minute. Are you... that lobby manager?

t_ch: 怎、怎么办…您、您应该是位好人……
t_en: Wh—What should I do... I—I think you're a good person...

t_ch: 别被{F#她}{M#他}骗了！巨人族都是恶念堆叠的聚合体，是狡猾的魔鬼！
t_en: Don't be fooled by {F#her}{M#him}! All giants harbor malicious intent. They're all cunning devils!

t_ch: 收割他们的脚踝！打碎他们的膝盖！
t_en: Slash their ankles! Crush their knees!

t_ch: 让傲慢的巨人都跪下来仰视我们！让他们全都记住「四尺圣堂」的教义！
t_en: Make those arrogant giants look up at us on their knees! Make them remember the doctrine of the "Four-Foot Hall"!

t_ch: 可我跪下来也比你们高啊？
t_en: But I'm still taller than you even when I'm on my knees.

t_ch: 看吧！傲慢！自负！阴暗的巨人！
t_en: See? How arrogant! How conceited! The giants are all wicked!

t_ch: （保持沉默）
t_en: (Remain silent.)

t_ch: 沉默！无言以对！阴暗的巨人，等待被矲主净化！
t_en: Silent! Speechless! Evil giant, you will be purified by the master!

t_ch: 的、的确，矲主大人亲口说过，绝对不能相信巨人的花言巧语……
t_en: In—Indeed. The master told us to never be swayed by the giants' blarney...

t_ch: 这、这里是「四尺圣堂」的聚会地…很、很抱歉，我不能让您进去！
t_en: Th—This is the gathering site of the Four-Foot Hall... I... I'm sorry I can't let you in!

t_ch: 我是来救人的。
t_en: I'm here to rescue someone.

t_ch: 骗子！伪善！真正的「四尺神子」根本不需要被巨人拯救！
t_en: Liar! Hypocrite! A true Four-Foot Follower doesn't need the help of a giant!

t_ch: 你们真以为能拦得住我？
t_en: Do you guys really think you can stop me?

t_ch: 暴戾！蛮横！看啊，邪恶的巨人终于藏不住{F#她}{M#他}的獠牙了！
t_en: Ruthless! Brutal! Look, the evil giant can barely hide {F#her}{M#his} fangs!

t_ch: 为、为了您的安全着想，请您放弃闯入的想法！
t_en: F—For the sake of your safety, please drop the idea of breaking in!

t_ch: （糟了，看来青雀是被这个皮皮西人的邪恶组织给绑架了……）
t_en: (This is bad. Looks like Qingque has been kidnapped by this evil Pepeshi organization...)

t_ch: （硬闯的话可能会让青雀置身险境…怎么办，有没有什么办法……）
t_en: (I might put Qingque in danger if I break in by force... Is there any other way to go about this...)

t_ch: （用来启动小小哈努行动的电视机…主意来了！）
t_en: (It's the TV that activates Hanu's Adventure... I have an idea!)

t_ch: （哼哼，这样就不会被拦住了吧？）
t_en: (Hmph, I bet no one can stop me now.)

t_ch: （等着吧，青雀！你的{F#好姐妹}{M#好兄弟}来救你了！）
t_en: (Wait for me, Qingque! Ya {F#girl}{M#boy} is coming to your rescue!)

t_ch: …嗨？你也是被骗进来的？
t_en: ...Hi? Did they trick you into joining them too?

t_ch: 我是来救你的，姐妹！
t_en: I'm here to rescue you, my friend.

t_ch: 我是{NICKNAME}！
t_en: I'm {NICKNAME}!

t_ch: 哼！哼…哼哼！
t_en: Hmph! Hmph... Hmph, hmph!

t_ch: 呃…你会说话吗？
t_en: Um... Can you speak?

t_ch: 糟糕！你拯救{F#闺蜜}{M#朋友}心切，居然忘记了哈努兄弟的重要设定。
t_en: Uh-oh! You're so eager to save your kindred spirit that you have overlooked an important characteristic of Brother Hanu.

t_ch: 必须想办法让青雀意识到你就是她的{F#好姐妹}{M#好兄弟}{NICKNAME}——该怎么做呢？
t_en: You have to find a way to let Qingque know you are {NICKNAME}, her {F#sister}{M#brother}-in-arms. What should you do?

t_ch: 模仿挥球棍的动作。
t_en: Act like you're swinging a bat.

t_ch: 你奋力模仿自己全盛时期挥动棒球棍的模样，并在心中大声默念：「规则，就是用来打破的！」
t_en: You make an all-out effort to mimic the way you swung the bat in your prime and recite loudly in your mind, "Rules are meant to be broken!"
...Huh?

t_ch: 噢，我懂了！你是想狠狠地教训教训这些可恶的家伙吧？我也一样！
t_en: Oh, I get it! You can't wait to teach these rascals a lesson, right? Me too!

t_ch: 可惜他们人多势众…没关系，我的{F#好姐妹}{M#好兄弟}很快就会来救我们出去的！
t_en: But we're outnumbered... Don't worry. My {F#sister}{M#brother}-in-arms will help us get out soon!

t_ch: …很显然，她完全没能理解你想要传达的意思。试试别的法子吧……
t_en: ...Obviously, you two have got your wires crossed. Let's try another way...

t_ch: 模仿桂乃芬倒立。
t_en: Do a handstand like Guinaifen.

t_ch: 你想象着桂乃芬街头直播卖艺的模样，以哈努兄弟的二头身材轻松做出了一套丝滑的倒立、回旋、空翻小连招——十分！
t_en: Picturing how Guinaifen does her street performances, you easily pull off a handstand, a pirouette, and a somersault with Brother Hanu's short body. Ten out of ten!
...Wow!

t_ch: 精彩，真精彩！小兄弟，没想到你居然这么有本事！
t_en: Amazing! Spectacular! I'm blown away by your talent, buddy!

t_ch: 青雀兴奋地鼓起了掌……
t_en: Qingque claps excitedly...

t_ch: …很显然，她完全没能理解你想要传达的意思。试试别的法子吧……
t_en: ...Obviously, you two have got your wires crossed. Let's try another way...

t_ch: 模仿下帝垣琼玉。
t_en: Act like you are playing Celestial Jade.

t_ch: 你盘起短小的双腿坐在地上，开始模仿起青雀聚精会神地打帝垣琼玉时的动作…摸牌、码牌、胡牌……
t_en: You sit cross-legged on the floor and imitate Qingque's focused face when playing Celestial Jade... You draw a tile, arrange your tiles, and win the game...

t_ch: 这、这是……
t_en: This... This is...

t_ch: 你、你居然也是帝垣琼玉牌手？！可惜现在就只有我们两个，等找到机会，我们一定要凑齐一桌打牌！
t_en: Y—You're a Celestial Jade player too!? It's a shame there are only two of us here. Let's get two more players to play with us next time!

t_ch: …很显然，她完全没能理解你想要传达的意思。试试别的法子吧……
t_en: ...Obviously, you two have got your wires crossed. Let's try another way...

t_ch: 你放弃了。
t_en: You give up.

t_ch: 你放弃了——无论你怎么做，都无法让青雀意识到你就是她的{F#好姐妹}{M#好兄弟}{NICKNAME}。你必须想别的办法把她营救出去……
t_en: You gave up. No matter what you did, you failed to make Qingque realize you were her companion, {NICKNAME}. You need to come up with another way to get her out.

t_ch: 一个念头突然从你脑中闪过——还记得之前来找你续房的奇怪二人组吗？机甲牛仔波提欧和纯美骑士银枝？
t_en: A thought suddenly flashes through your mind. Still remember that strange duo who requested your service to extend their stay before? Boothill the cyborg cowboy and Argenti the Knight of Beauty?

t_ch: 那两个人此刻或许正在梦境中展开调查…或许他们能来客串下救火队员？
t_en: Those two might be conducting an investigation in the Dreamscape right now... They can probably help out.

t_ch: 事态紧急，但你没法在变身的情况下掏出手机联系他们。一是因为哈努兄弟的手实在太小，二是因为我们根本没做相关的动画。
t_en: The situation's pressing, but you can't take out your phone to contact them when you're in Brother Hanu's body. It's partly because Brother Hanu's hands are too small, and partly because the dev team didn't make the animation for that part.

t_ch: 回到电视那里去吧……
t_en: Let's return to the TV...

t_ch: 焦虑地等待了一阵之后，波提欧和银枝来到了你的面前……
t_en: After waiting anxiously for a while, Boothill and Argenti arrive...

t_ch: 挚友——我们收到了你的求救消息，然后便以骑士之速赶来了。
t_en: My friend, we got your call for help and rushed over here at the speed of a knight.

t_ch: 骑士之速是什么玩意？巡海游侠才是速度的象征！
t_en: Speed of a knight? The Galaxy Rangers are the fastest!

t_ch: …等会儿，我跟你争这个干嘛？{NICKNAME}，你说你找到那个「组织」了？在哪？
t_en: ...Hold on. Why am I even competing with you over this? {NICKNAME}, you said you found that "organization." Where is it?

t_ch: （指向楼下）
t_en: (Point at the lower floor)

t_ch: 你们自己看吧。
t_en: Check it out yourself.

t_ch: …宝了个贝的，哪来的这么多皮皮西人？这场面我可没见过。
t_en: ...The fork. I've never seen so many Pepeshi in the same place before.

t_ch: 啊，这是多么…多么令人费解的景象。即便博爱如伊德莉拉，恐怕也不会将目光投向此处吧……
t_en: Ah, what a perplexing sight. I'm afraid not even the altruistic Idrila would cast her gaze upon this place...

t_ch: 等会儿，所以{NICKNAME}的意思是…这群皮皮西就是我们在找的那帮恶棍？
t_en: Wait, so what {NICKNAME} means is... these Pepeshi are the thugs we're looking for?

t_ch: 我验过了，这就是个邪恶组织。
t_en: I've verified it — this is an evil organization.

t_ch: 他们把我的朋友抓走了！
t_en: They abducted my friend!

t_ch: 让我再瞅一眼…「邪恶组织经常倾巢出动，无差别地袭击街上的行人——主要犯罪方式包括：用钝器敲击膝盖、强迫下跪、偷走鞋子和帽子……」
t_en: Let me take another look at them... "Cults often act in groups and attack pedestrians indiscriminately. The crimes they mainly commit include hitting people's knees with blunt objects, forcing them to kneel, and stealing their shoes and hats..."

t_ch: 这么说来，波提欧兄弟的帽子刚才也是被一个皮皮西人抢走的。
t_en: By the way, Boothill's hat was stolen by a Pepeshi just now too.

t_ch: 真没想到啊，这群小东西！一个个看着人模人样的，背后竟然一点人事都不干！
t_en: I can't believe it! These little rascals! They seem decent but are wicked deep down!

t_ch: 跟我走！今儿个我就要为民除害，给这帮危险分子留个教训！
t_en: Follow me! I'm going to do the world a favor by teaching these dangerous criminals a lesson!

t_ch: 喂喂喂，那边的小可爱们，看这儿看这儿！
t_en: Hey, you lil' fudgehead over there! Look here!

t_ch: 我去，这又是从哪冒出来的妖孽？！
t_en: Shoot, who's this monster that popped up out of nowhere!?

t_ch: 太…太可怕了！世间竟然存在着如此面目可憎的巨人，而且还是两个！矲主，宽恕他们……
t_en: Soooo... scary! It's unbelievable there exist such hideous giants in this world. And there are two of them! Master, please pardon them...

t_ch: 「面目可憎的巨人」？多么丑陋的称呼！我不能放任你们侮辱我的挚友和波提欧兄弟。
t_en: "Hideous giants"? What a repulsive title! I can't let you insult my friend and Boothill here.

t_ch: 从你嘴里说出来，倒也正常…
t_en: Why am I not surprised to hear this from you...

t_ch: 原来你是这样理解的吗？
t_en: Is that how you interpret it?

t_ch: 我宣布，你们到处祸害无辜路人的日子到头了！乖乖把人质交出来，然后给我滚出匹诺康尼——照着我说的做，保你们平安！
t_en: I declare that your days of bullying innocent people are now over! Release the hostage, then get out of Penacony. Your safety will be guaranteed if you do as I say!

t_ch: 嚯嚯，好嚣张的邪恶巨人……
t_en: Woah, what an aggressive and evil giant...

t_ch: 但别忘了，在矲主的祝福加持下，我们「四尺圣堂」可是战无不胜的！弟兄姐妹们，给我敲碎这些恶徒的膝盖！
t_en: Don't forget that we, the Four-Foot Hall, are invincible with the master's blessing! Everyone, crush the knees of these villains!

t_ch: …宝了个贝的，他们还想来真的？
t_en: ...Holy forkeroni. Do they really want to get physical?

t_ch: 小心，挚友！请站在我和波提欧兄弟的身后。
t_en: Be careful, my friend! Please stand behind Boothill and me.

t_ch: 狂热的「四尺圣堂」教徒们奋力跳起来敲打波提欧和银枝的膝盖……
t_en: The zealous followers of Four-Foot Hall jump with all their might and strike at Boothill and Argenti's knees...

t_ch: …但是收效甚微，如同你在游戏中用普通系的技能攻击钢系的对手。
t_en: ...But with little success. Imagine using a Normal-Type attack on a Steel-Type opponent in a game.

t_ch: 呜哇！疼疼疼，我的手好疼……
t_en: Ouch! It's so painful! My hands hurt...

t_ch: 为、为什么？！这些巨人，居然免疫了我们灌注了信仰的攻击？
t_en: Wh—What's going on!? How come these giants are immune to our faith-infused attacks?

t_ch: …游侠机器，小子！
t_en: ...I'm a muddle-fudging cyborg Ranger, kid!

t_ch: 看来，纯美骑士的信念在你们之上。
t_en: Looks like the belief of the Knights of Beauty reigns supreme over yours.

t_ch: …虔信者们，冷静！
t_en: ...Everyone, please stay calm!

t_ch: 「四尺神王」已然发话…祂令我们不要慌张，要以理解与敬畏之姿面对我们的敌人。
t_en: The Four-Foot Aeon has spoken... They urged us not to panic, but to face our enemies with understanding and respect.

t_ch: 污秽的巨人族啊，你们因何要打破这「四尺圣堂」的宁静？你们受何种殃孽驱使，要将苦难传播给这世上的人？
t_en: You filthy giants, why must you disrupt the peace of the Four-Foot Hall? What kind of vile belief compels you to spread misery to the people of this world?

t_ch: 说话一套一套的，看来你就是管事的了？
t_en: Given your eloquence, you must be the one in charge here, right?

t_ch: 我可不想跟你们这帮小可爱废话！我给你们一分钟的时间，把人质交出来，否则后果自负！
t_en: I don't want to waste my breath arguing with you little forkers! Hand over the hostage in one minute, or you'll suffer for it!

t_ch: 无可救药的恶徒，背负原罪的邪恶巨人……
t_en: You incorrigible, sinful giant...

t_ch: 我本想向「四尺神王」祈祷，请求祂对你们的宽恕…但无奈你们已经病入膏肓，无药可医。
t_en: I wanted to pray to the Four-Foot Aeon and ask for their forgiveness for you, but you are beyond redemption.

t_ch: 既然如此，那便只能以雷霆手段显我「四尺圣堂」的慈悲心肠了……
t_en: If so, I have no choice but to adopt a more aggressive measure to manifest the kindness of the Four-Foot Hall...

t_ch: <size=28>关门，放惊梦剧团！</size>
t_en: <size=28>Close the door and release the Dreamjolt Troupe!</size>

t_ch: 哎哟喂，没想到这帮家伙还带了真家伙！
t_en: Woah, I didn't see this coming!

t_ch: 波提欧兄弟——有机会与你并肩作战、铲除奸邪，我倍感荣幸！
t_en: Boothill, I'm truly honored to stand by your side in this fight against evil!

t_ch: 结果还是变成这样了…
t_en: In the end, we still have to resort to violence...

t_ch: …请保护好我的膝盖！
t_en: ...Please protect my knees!

t_ch: 望着楼下群魔乱舞的皮皮西信徒们，你突然陷入了沉思……
t_en: As you look down at the crowd of Pepeshi cultists below, you find yourself lost in thought...

t_ch: 身为匹诺康尼的大救星，遐迩闻名的银河球棒侠，你真的没法独自解决眼前这个*小麻烦*吗？
t_en: As the savior of Penacony and the renowned Galactic Baseballer, surely you can handle this small issue on your own, right?

t_ch: 说不定他们藏了什么秘密武器。
t_en: Perhaps they are concealing some secret weapons.

t_ch: 好好好，你说的都对，谨慎{F#小姐}{M#先生}。
t_en: Alright, alright. You're totally right about that, {F#Ms.}{M#Mr.} Cautious.

t_ch: 我可没傻到一打二十……
t_en: I'm not that stupid to take on twenty of them alone...

t_ch: 越是到了关键时刻越需要理性的思考。干得漂亮，{NICKNAME}。
t_en: The more critical the moment, the more important it is to think rationally. Good job, {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 组成三巨头再上不好吗？
t_en: Wouldn't it be awesome to team up as a trio before diving into battle?

t_ch: 看来你深谙取胜之匙——没错，在这个时代，组成银河战舰才是赢家正道。
t_en: You have grasped the key to victory. That's right, the key to winning in this era is to combine yourselves into a cosmic battleship before crushing your opponents.

t_ch: 现在，你要做的就是等待。
t_en: Now, all that's left is to wait.

t_ch: 怎、怎么会这样？矲主的神通力，在理应外强中干的巨人族面前居然显得不堪一击……
t_en: H—How could this happen? The all-mighty master seems so powerless against those giants, who are supposed to be weak despite their size...

t_ch: 没道理啊，这…这根本就说不通，矲主大人明明应该是「四尺神王」的令使，世间所有袖珍族的英明领袖……
t_en: This... doesn't make sense. The master is the Emanator of the Four-Foot Aeon and a capable leader of all diminutive races in the world.

t_ch: …什么神王啊领袖的，你们都被这家伙忽悠瘸了吧？
t_en: ...Aeon? Leader? I guess you guys have been taken for a ride by this dude.

t_ch: 呵，顺带一提，我刚才的提议还没过期。再给你们四十秒，赶紧把人质交出来！然后滚出我的视线，不然就等着挨枪子儿吧！
t_en: Heh, by the way, my offer just now still stands. I'll give you another <unbreak>40</unbreak> seconds to release the hostage and get out of my sight. Otherwise, I'll let you taste my bullets!

t_ch: 唔…此、此乃我等修行路上的小小障碍，不要让这几个卑劣的恶徒阻拦了你们开悟的道路！
t_en: Um... Th—This is just a small hurdle on our path to cultivation. Don't let these despicable thugs impede your enlightenment!

t_ch: 只、只要能再多收一些会费…没错，只要「四尺圣堂」的经费再充足一些，打败这些巨人族就根本不在话下！
t_en: I—I just need to raise the membership fee... That's right. As long as the Four-Foot Hall has sufficient funds, we'll surely be able to finish off these giants!

t_ch: 看到了吧？他只是想骗钱。
t_en: Hear that? He's just after your money.

t_ch: 你、你给我闭嘴！
t_en: Y—You shut up!

t_ch: 你叔叔不是很有钱吗？
t_en: Isn't your uncle loaded?

t_ch: 谁、谁让你提奥帝叔叔了！快闭嘴！
t_en: Wh—Why did you mention Uncle Oti! Zip it!

t_ch: 这…这是真的吗，矲主大人？「四尺圣堂」真的只是你为了敛财打的幌子吗？
t_en: Is... Is that true, master? Is the Four-Foot Hall just your scheme to scam our money?

t_ch: 还不打算动起来啊？时间不多咯！
t_en: Still not moving? There isn't much time left for you!

t_ch: 把小命搭在这儿可太不值了，先跑为敬！
t_en: It's not worth it to risk my life here. Let me run while I still can!

t_ch: 什么「四尺神子」，原来根本就是个冒牌的令使…退会，我要退会！
t_en: What "Four-Foot Follower"? He's just a fake emanator... I want a refund for my membership!

t_ch: 一群信仰不坚定的假信徒！跑吧，尽管跑，你们休想从我这儿拿回一分钱的会费——休想！
t_en: A bunch of weak-willed fake followers! Run all you want, you will never get a dime from me. Never!

t_ch: 早知道那个有牌瘾的女人是个不祥之兆…这、这回就算你们赢了，下次再遇见我可别想全身而退！你们都给我记住了！
t_en: I knew that girl with Celestial Jade addiction was a bad omen... Even though you win this time, don't think you will have it easy again next time we cross paths! Keep that in mind!

t_ch: 罗伊罗伊飞速逃离了你们的视线，你对着历代无名客发誓，他绝对是你见过的步频最快的皮皮西人……
t_en: Royroy flees at lightning speed and disappears. You swear to your Nameless predecessors that he is definitely the fastest Pepeshi you have ever seen...

t_ch: {F#好姐妹}{M#好兄弟}！我就知道，你肯定会来救我的！
t_en: My friend! I knew you would come to my rescue!

t_ch: 刚才你们痛扁那个恶棍教主的过程，我全都看见了——那边的两位不愧是你找来的帮手！看他们这身行头就知道，肯定是专业人士。
t_en: I saw the whole thing when you guys were teaching that evil cult leader a lesson. The two helpers of yours are really something! I can tell they are pros just by looking at their attire.

t_ch: 波提欧，银枝——这是青雀。
t_en: Boothill and Argenti, this is Qingque.

t_ch: 幸会，青雀女士。
t_en: It's my pleasure to meet you, Miss Qingque.

t_ch: 哟，看样子这位小妹还是仙舟人？你好啊。
t_en: Huh, you from the Xianzhou, miss? Hello there!

t_ch: 嗨呀，你们好！
t_en: Hi, everyone!

t_ch: 青雀——这是波提欧和银枝。
t_en: Qingque, this is Boothill and Argenti.

t_ch: 嗨呀，你们好！
t_en: Hi, everyone!

t_ch: 幸会，青雀女士。
t_en: It's my pleasure to meet you, Miss Qingque.

t_ch: 哟，看样子这位小妹还是仙舟人？你好啊。
t_en: Huh, you from the Xianzhou, miss? Hello there!

t_ch: 真是太感谢你们啦。回想一下，我之前可真是蠢得离谱…那条邀请信息明显有猫腻，我怎么就没看出来呢？果然是被小便宜给蒙蔽了双眼。
t_en: I owe you guys a big one! Looking back, I realize I was really foolish... That invitation message was so shady. Why didn't I notice it? I was totally blinded by greed.

t_ch: 如此说来，波提欧兄弟——轻易放那个所谓的「矲主」离开，是否会成为隐患？伊德莉拉在上，我绝不想放任一个邪恶组织的头子在外逍遥…他甚至可能找到机会卷土重来。
t_en: Speaking of which, could Boothill's going easy on that "master" become an unseen misfortune? With Idrila's blessing, it's against my wish to let an evil leader go unpunished... He might even make a comeback when the opportunity arises.

t_ch: 放一万个心吧，银枝兄弟！那家伙的名字和面相我都已经记住了。在星海的这一片混，被巡海游侠惦记上的人，就别想着能睡上安稳觉了！
t_en: Relax, Argenti! I've got his name and face locked in my memory. Anyone who's on the radar of a Galaxy Ranger can never sleep well at night as long as they are in this part of the starry skies!

t_ch: 哈…这趟匹诺康尼之旅可太刺激了。早知道会遭这罪，我还不如留在司里摸摸鱼、打打牌呢……
t_en: Ha, this trip to Penacony has been quite a ride. If I'd known I would have gone through this ordeal, I would have just stayed back home and slacked off...

t_ch: 对了，{NICKNAME}，要不要一起拍个照片？咱们这神奇的四人组合，可以算得上是稀世罕见了吧？
t_en: How about we take a photo together, {NICKNAME}? The universe might never see another group more peculiar than us!

t_ch: 绝好的主意，青雀女士。我的匹诺康尼之旅也已接近尾声，此前也正为没能带走配得上「纯美」的纪念之物而感到烦恼。
t_en: That's a brilliant idea, Miss Qingque. As my journey on Penacony is coming to an end, I've had a hard time finding a souvenir worthy of the Beauty.

t_ch: …拍照？行，但是记得拍完了别到大街上招摇，我的大头照可还在公司的通缉令上呢！
t_en: ...Photo? No problem, but just don't show it around in public. My photo is still on the IPC's wanted posters!

t_ch: 你们这些代拍的…
t_en: You paparazzi...

t_ch: 有没有点公德心！
t_en: Have you no sense of decency!?

t_ch: 你们负得了责吗？
t_en: Can you guys bear the responsibility!?

t_ch: 知更鸟！知更鸟！
t_en: Robin! Robin!

t_ch: 一定要来泰科铵巡演啊！
t_en: Please come to Taikiyan for your tour!

t_ch: 嘿嘿，消息还真准确…
t_en: Hee-hee, the tip is quite accurate...

t_ch: 这次得多拍几张……
t_en: I must take more photos this time...

t_ch: 看呐，是知更鸟！
t_en: Look, it's Robin!

t_ch: 知更鸟？噢，是那个吧——
t_en: Robin? Oh, it's that celebrity...

t_ch: 「再给我两份葱…」
t_en: "Two more portions of scallions, please..."

t_ch: 「…让我把鲫鱼煎成饼？」
t_en: "...You want me to make a pancake with carp?"

t_ch: …你是认真的吗？
t_en: ...Are you serious?

t_ch: （糟了，青雀不会要出事吧…得加快速度！）
t_en: (Oh no, did something bad happen to Qingque? I have to move faster!)

t_ch: …嗯？哪位？
t_en: ...Hmm? Who are you?

t_ch: 啊，一位面生的朋友…想必你也是来投入「四尺圣堂」的怀抱的吧？
t_en: Ah, a friend with an unfamiliar face... I assume you've come to seek the embrace of the Four-Foot Hall, haven't you?

t_ch: 发出一声轻蔑的「哼」。
t_en: Let out a disdainful "Hmph."

t_ch: 发出一声挑衅的「哼」。
t_en: Let out a provocative "Hmph."

t_ch: 呵呵…我不得不承认，朋友——你很有性格。
t_en: Heh... I must admit, my friend, you possess quite a distinct character.

t_ch: 无妨，你可以多花些时间观察、思考。很快你就会发现，「四尺圣堂」是一片洁净的乐土，是每个彷徨灵魂追求的归宿。
t_en: But no worries, take your time to observe and contemplate. Soon enough, you will realize that the Four-Foot Hall is a true promised land, a place where all wondering souls can find solace.

t_ch: 你会逐渐理解我们的使命和其重要性，进而成为「四尺神子」的一员。我，罗伊罗伊，作为「四尺之神」的令使，会引领所有人走上救赎的命途，反抗巨人族的压迫。
t_en: Eventually, you will understand the significance of our mission and become a Four-Foot Follower. As an Emanator of the Four-Foot Aeon, I, Royroy, will guide you on the path of salvation against the oppression of the giants.

t_ch: 四下看看吧，朋友！给自己一点时间，给心灵开一扇窗，让信仰的光辉沁润你疲惫的灵魂……
t_en: Feel free to look around, my friend! Allow yourself some time, open the window to your heart, and let your weary soul bask in the light of faith...

t_ch: 皮皮西人的口气如此热情真挚，毫无表演的痕迹——一时间，你觉得他或许真的笃信着自己的布道。
t_en: This Pepeshi's words sound warm and sincere, devoid of any pretense... For a moment, you wonder if he genuinely believes in his sermon.

t_ch: 为了防止被洗脑，你最好还是离他远点……
t_en: To avoid being influenced, it would be wise to keep your distance from him...

t_ch: …干嘛？没看见我在打牌啊？一边凉快——
t_en: ...Stop disturbing me! Can't you see I'm in the middle of a game? Just get out of...

t_ch: ——哎哟，原来是{NICKNAME}{F#女士}{M#先生}！真不好意思，我刚才打牌打得入神了，没注意到是您。
t_en: ...Ooooh! It's you, {F#Miss}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME}! I'm so sorry! I was so absorbed in the game that I didn't realize it was you.

t_ch: 那个，呃，您不会…不会是来叫我回去上班的吧？您看，我现在手气正旺，这么宝贵的运势，想必像您这样善解人意的{F#女士}{M#先生}一定不会忍心把它割断吧……
t_en: You... I mean... you're not here to get me back to work, right? Look, I've got a winning streak going on here, and I'm sure a thoughtful and caring {F#lady}{M#gentleman} like you wouldn't want to interrupt it...

t_ch: 我不会，但说不定老奥帝会。
t_en: I wouldn't, but maybe Old Oti would.

t_ch: 那就让前台一直空着吧。
t_en: Sure, let's just leave the reception desk unattended.

t_ch: 好到值得为它丢了工作？
t_en: Is it worth losing your job?

t_ch: 哎、哎哟，我就说句玩笑话，您别当真啊！大堂不可一日无主，现在前台的投诉热线说不定已经被打爆了……
t_en: H—hey! I was just messing around! Don't take it so seriously! We can't leave the lobby unattended. I bet the complaint line at the reception desk is blowing up...

t_ch: 我这就收拾收拾，准备回现实去……
t_en: Well, I'll pack up and return to reality...

t_ch: 喂喂喂！你走了，我们怎么办？
t_en: Hey! Hold on! What are we supposed to do if you leave?

t_ch: 就是就是！没听过那个经典段子吗？「三缺一，狗东西；鸽牌局，遭雷劈」！
t_en: Exactly! You know the saying, right? "Bounce from the game, bad luck be your fate!"

t_ch: …装什么装，你不也是两个系统时之前才学会打牌的吗？那段子也是你现搜的吧，别想靠这个唬住我！
t_en: ...Who are you trying to fool? You only learned this game a couple of system hours ago! And you just looked up that line, didn't you? Don't try to bluff me with that!

t_ch: 帝垣琼玉在匹诺康尼很火？
t_en: Is Celestial Jade popular in Penacony?

t_ch: 不能说是非常火爆，但也算得上闻所未闻——多亏了那位从仙舟远道而来的少女棋士，是她教会了我们如此有趣的游戏！
t_en: It's not like it's all the rage, but it's definitely something novel! Thanks to that young lady who came all the way from the Xianzhou! She introduced us to this fun game!

t_ch: 谁教你们玩这种牌的？
t_en: Who taught you this game?

t_ch: 啊，说来也巧，我刚入梦不久就遇到了一位从仙舟远道而来的少女棋士，她极力向我推荐「帝垣琼玉」，在座的几位也一下就被这游戏给吸引住了。
t_en: Oh, it was just pure luck! Right after I dived into the Dreamscape, I met a young lady proficient in the game from the distant Xianzhou. She highly recommended this game called "Celestial Jade," and we got hooked right away.

t_ch: 我不管，我还没打够。你如果要走，那就把{F#她}{M#他}留下来陪我们打牌！
t_en: I don't care! I'm not done having fun yet! If you're leaving, ask {F#her}{M#him} to stay and play with us!

t_ch: 呃…{NICKNAME}{F#女士}{M#先生}，您觉得呢？这牌桌三缺一的滋味确实不好受啊，您如此善解人意……
t_en: Um... what do you think, {F#Ms.}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME}? It's terrible to have one player short for this 4-player game. Since you're so understanding...

t_ch: 可我不懂规则。
t_en: But I don't know the rules.

t_ch: 怕什么？简单得很，一学就会。
t_en: Don't worry! It's super easy, you'll pick it up in no time.

t_ch: 就是就是，赶紧过来坐下吧！那个丹什么的，你可以闪了！
t_en: Yeah, just come over and take a seat! That "Dandy" guy can leave now!

t_ch: 嘿嘿嘿，我们肯定会好好招待你的，新手……
t_en: Heehee, we'll make sure you have a great time, novice...

t_ch: 来就来，谁怕谁？
t_en: Just bring it on! I ain't scared!

t_ch: 好好好，就喜欢这种痛快的！
t_en: Great! That's the attitude!

t_ch: 很好很好，快过来坐下吧！那个丹什么的，你可以闪了！
t_en: Awesome! Just come over and take a seat! That "Dandy" guy can leave now!

t_ch: 嘿嘿嘿，我们肯定会好好招待你的，新手……
t_en: Heehee, we'll make sure you have a great time, novice...

t_ch: 唔…那我就回去工作了。祝各位玩得开心，玩得愉快……
t_en: Well... I guess I should get back to work then. Have fun and enjoy yourselves...

t_ch: 丹西带着哭腔离开了你们的视线…
t_en: Dancy leaves with a hint of sadness in his voice...

t_ch: 但你一刻都没有为他感到悲伤，接下来开启的就是紧张刺激的帝垣琼玉牌局……
t_en: But you don't feel sorry for him even for a second because, in the next moment, you're fully immersed in the intense and thrilling game of Celestial Jade...

t_ch: 眨眼间，三个系统时过去了……
t_en: Three system hours fly by without you even realizing it...

t_ch: …我胡了！
t_en: ...Huh! I've won!

t_ch: 怎、怎么可能！怎么又让{F#她}{M#他}给胡了？！
t_en: H—how is this even possible! Why does {F#she}{M#he} keep winning!?

t_ch: 难道我的新手光环真的已经失效了？我、我不能接受啊……
t_en: Has my beginner's luck truly abandoned me? I... I can't accept this...

t_ch: 要不今天就到这儿吧？再接着打下去感觉也很难逆转局面了。
t_en: Maybe we should call it a day? I don't think we'll turn the tables even if we keep playing.

t_ch: 说得有道理…撤了撤了！可恶，下次一定要赢回来……
t_en: Good point... I'm out! Darn it, I'll win next time...

t_ch: （帝垣琼玉…没想到居然是这么好玩的游戏！回车上以后一定要教会其他人……）
t_en: (Celestial Jade...... I never knew it was such a fun game! I have to teach the others when I get back to the Express...)

t_ch: （算算人数：我、三月、丹恒、帕姆、姬子、杨叔，黑天鹅也先算进去吧……）
t_en: (Let's count the people there: Me, March, Dan Heng, Pom-Pom, Himeko, Mr. Yang... and let's count Black Swan in too...)

t_ch: （七个人，凑不齐两桌呢…哎，列车组什么时候能有新成员加入呢？）
t_en: (But that's only seven of us... one person short for two games... When will we ever find a new Crew member?)

t_ch: 碰！
t_en: Peng!

t_ch: 杠！
t_en: Gang!

t_ch: 听！
t_en: Ting!

t_ch: 哈哈，我胡了！
t_en: Hu! Haha! I've won!

t_ch: 我一定会牢记矲主的训诫…
t_en: I'll heed the Master's admonishments...

t_ch: 怜悯巨人就是背叛教义…
t_en: Pity not the giants, for it breaches my creeds...

t_ch: 我们都是「四尺神子」…
t_en: We are all the Four-Foot Followers...
